news.title: Stocks Are Rising. Markets Shrug Off Mideast Tensions.
news.summary: U.S. stocks rose, taking no cues from renewed tensions in the Middle East as traders kick off a busy holiday shortened week.  The Dow was up 0.2%.  Diplomacy efforts between the U.S. and Iran appear to be weakening after the U.S. launched new strikes overnight.

news.title: FCX Leads Metal And Mining Stocks Near Buy Points On Peace Hopes
